candidate_definitions.text: NeoTerm - The NEO Terminal Emulator Application For All Type Of OS With Variety Of Packages. Written In NEO Programming Language (NeoLang).

[NeoTerm](https://github.com/neoterm/neoterm) is a powerful terminal emulator designed for all major operating systems, including Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, and Linux. NeoTerm builds on the concept of providing a complete Linux environment across your devices, making it a per…
